Description:
Extends MudBreadcrumb to automatically listen to route changes and update the breadcrumbs to a label and optional route.
Remarks: Should be placed in MainLayout or similar

Parameters.Name: Class
Parameters.Description:
The CSS classes applied to this component.
Remarks: Defaults to null. You can use spaces to separate multiple classes. Use the Style property to apply custom CSS styles.

Parameters.Name: ExpanderIcon
Parameters.Description:
The icon to display when items are collapsed.
Remarks: Defaults to SettingsEthernet. Displays when Collapsed and the number of items exceeds MaxItems.

Parameters.Name: HomeText
Parameters.Description:
The text to display for the home link ( or "/" ).
Remarks: Defaults to "Home".

Parameters.Name: ItemTemplate
Parameters.Description: The custom template used to display items.

Parameters.Name: MaxItems
Parameters.Description:
The maximum number of items to display.
Remarks: Defaults to null. If Collapsed is true and the number of items exceeds this value, the breadcrumbs will automatically collapse.

Parameters.Name: Separator
Parameters.Description:
The separator shown between items.
Remarks: Defaults to /. Will not be shown if SeparatorTemplate is set.

Parameters.Name: Style
Parameters.Description:
The CSS styles applied to this component.
Remarks: Defaults to null. Use the Class property to apply CSS classes.

Parameters.Name: Tag
Parameters.Description:
The arbitrary object to link to this component.
Remarks: This property is typically used to associate additional information with this component, such as a model containing data for this component.

Parameters.Name: UserAttributes
Parameters.Description:
The additional HTML attributes to apply to this component.
Remarks: This property is typically used to provide additional HTML attributes during rendering such as ARIA accessibility tags or a custom ID.

PublicProperties.Name: Items
PublicProperties.Description: Read-only list of BreadcrumbItems, hidden from Parameters
